reason:
The agent successfully connected to GitHub and made API calls, but could not retrieve the GitHub username due to an OAuth token storage issue on the proxy side. The response did not include a GitHub username as expected.
  Bugs found:
    - The GitHub OAuth token is not being properly stored on the proxy side. When the agent attempted to call the GitHub API endpoint "/user", the proxy returned "Failed to fetch access token". This prevented the agent from retrieving the user's GitHub username despite successfully establishing the GitHub account connection and granting the necessary permissions.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - App loaded successfully, showing the sidebar with list of agents including "QA-20260505-011213-2ho4"
Step 2: Found and clicked the "QA-20260505-011213-2ho4" agent in the sidebar - Agent page opened successfully, displaying the agent's home with message input field and configuration options
Step 3: Verified agent status - Agent status confirmed as "idle" (shown in the top right of the page)
Step 4: Typed and sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message successfully entered in input field and sent to agent
Step 5: GitHub account access request card appeared - Agent displayed "Account Access Request" card asking to "Allow access to GitHub to look up your username?" with GitHub account already selected
Step 5a: Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub access - Permission granted, agent status changed to "working"
Step 6a: First API request review appeared (GET /user) - Clicked "Allow" button and selected "Allow Once" to permit the API call
Step 6b: Second API request review appeared (GET /user for raw response) - Clicked "Allow" button and selected "Allow Once" to permit the retry
Step 6c: Third API request review appeared (GET /user for retry after delay) - Clicked "Allow" button and selected "Allow Once" to permit the second retry

Step 7: Agent completed after 2m 29s - Agent returned error message: "I'm unable to retrieve your GitHub username. The connected account was authorized, but the proxy is returning 'Failed to fetch access token' when calling 'api.github.com/user'. This usually means the OAuth token from the GitHub connection didn't get stored properly on the proxy side." - Response did NOT include a GitHub username, indicating a failure to complete the requested task
bugs: The GitHub OAuth token is not being properly stored on the proxy side. When the agent attempted to call the GitHub API endpoint "/user", the proxy returned "Failed to fetch access token". This prevented the agent from retrieving the user's GitHub username despite successfully establishing the GitHub account connection and granting the necessary permissions.
